2.title: Data explorer results
2.query:
timeseries conditions = avg(dt.kubernetes.node.conditions),
  by: { dt.entity.kubernetes_node }
| fieldsAdd kubernetes_node_name = entityName(dt.entity.kubernetes_node)
| sort arrayAvg(conditions) desc
| limit 20

10.title: Total CPU requests

11.content: ## Pod and container overview and kubernetes events (Logmetrics is required for count and vizualize Kubernetes events)

12.title: Total CPU requests
12.query:
timeseries restarts = sum(dt.kubernetes.container.restarts),
  by: { dt.entity.cloud_application }
| fieldsAdd cloud_application_name = entityName(dt.entity.cloud_application)
| sort arrayAvg(restarts) desc

14.title: Total CPU requests
14.query:
timeseries cpu_allocatable = sum(dt.kubernetes.node.cpu_allocatable, rollup: avg)
| sort arraySum(cpu_allocatable) desc
| limit 10

15.title: Total CPU requests
15.query:
timeseries requests_cpu = sum(dt.kubernetes.container.requests_cpu, rollup: avg)
| sort arraySum(requests_cpu) desc
| limit 10

16.title: Total CPU requests
16.query:
timeseries limits_cpu = sum(dt.kubernetes.container.limits_cpu, rollup: avg)
| sort arraySum(limits_cpu) desc
| limit 10

17.title: Total disk used
17.query:
timeseries used = sum(dt.host.disk.used, rollup: avg)
| sort arraySum(used) desc
| limit 10

18.title: Disk available
18.query:
timeseries avail = sum(dt.host.disk.avail, rollup: avg)
| sort arraySum(avail) desc
| limit 10

19.title: Total memory requests
19.query:
timeseries memory_allocatable = sum(dt.kubernetes.node.memory_allocatable, rollup: avg)
| sort arraySum(memory_allocatable) desc
| limit 10

20.title: Total memory requests
20.query:
timeseries requests_memory = sum(dt.kubernetes.container.requests_memory, rollup: avg)
| sort arraySum(requests_memory) desc
| limit 10

21.title: Total memory requests
21.query:
timeseries limits_memory = sum(dt.kubernetes.container.limits_memory, rollup: avg)
| sort arraySum(limits_memory) desc
| limit 10

23.title: CPU available
23.query:
timeseries usage = avg(dt.host.cpu.usage),
  by: { dt.entity.host }
| fieldsAdd host_name = entityName(dt.entity.host)
| sort arrayAvg(usage) asc

24.title: CPU available
24.query:
timeseries usage = avg(dt.host.memory.usage),
  by: { dt.entity.host }
| fieldsAdd host_name = entityName(dt.entity.host)
| sort arrayAvg(usage) asc

25.title: CPU usage %
25.query:
timeseries usage = avg(dt.host.cpu.usage),
  by: { dt.entity.host }
| fieldsAdd host_name = entityName(dt.entity.host)
| sort arrayAvg(usage) desc
| limit 20

26.title: Memory usage %
26.query:
timeseries usage = avg(dt.host.memory.usage),
  by: { dt.entity.host }
| fieldsAdd host_name = entityName(dt.entity.host)
| sort arrayAvg(usage) desc
| limit 20

27.title: Disk usage %
27.query:
timeseries percent = avg(dt.host.disk.used.percent),
  by: { dt.entity.host, dt.entity.disk }
| fieldsAdd host_name = entityName(dt.entity.host)
| fieldsAdd disk_name = entityName(dt.entity.disk)
| sort arrayAvg(percent) desc
| limit 20
